title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLIX. Gaffers And Gammers.
content:
Old Mother Niddity Nod swore by the pudding-bag,
            She would go to Stoken Church fair;
        And then old Father Peter said he would meet her
            Before she got half-way there.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCLIX. Gaffers And Gammers."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
